channel.title: The K-Beauty Data Desk
channel.description: I read all the reviews so you don't have to. Honest, data-backed takes on Korea's best-selling skincare.

item.title: S.NATURE Aqua Squalane Moisture Cream: What 15,832 Real Reviews Actually Say (2026)
item.description: S.NATURE Aqua Squalane Moisture Cream: 4.8★ from 15,832 Korean reviews (86% five-star). A combination and dry skin pick, rated highest for hydration.…
